mapper.select: SELECT member_no, member_id, member_mdn, member_svc_mang_no AS serviceManagementNo FROM tb_member WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_aflo_character VALUES ( #{characterNo}, (SELECT vas_id FROM tb_vas ORDER BY create_dtime DESC limit 1), (SELECT vas_id FROM tb_vas ORDER BY create_dtime DESC limit 1), '9999-12-31 23:59:59', '9999-12-31 23:59:59', now(), now() );
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM tb_character_prefer_artist WHERE character_no = #{characterNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_character_prefer_artist VALUES (#{characterNo},'PREFER', #{preferGenreId}, #{preferArtistId}, now(), now())
